description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a camouflage green and black finish, designed for urban or woodland environments. The rifle features a collapsible stock, ergonomic pistol grip, and a detachable magazine, all wrapped in a matching camouflage pattern. The barrel is long and slender, fitted with a suppressor at the muzzle for reduced noise signature. The upper receiver includes a rail system, though no optical sights are mounted, and standard iron sights are present. The handguard and suppressor are both wrapped in the same camouflage material, providing visual continuity and aiding concealment. The overall build suggests a lightweight, maneuverable firearm suitable for close to mid-range engagements.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a green camouflage finish, collapsible stock, suppressor, and iron sights. The design is lightweight and optimized for urban or woodland use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the collapsible stock, suppressor, and camouflage pattern.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail of the stock or grip visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's profile, collapsible stock, and camouflage-wrapped suppressor.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the receiver, with the suppressor and barrel extending away.
